start.title: Half-Buried Body
start.text: A corpse lies half-buried in the snow, one arm reaching upward as if begging the sky for mercy.

search.title: Cold Fingers
search.text: The corpse is frozen stiff. You find a small token clenched in its hand, but prying it loose feels almost like theft.

leave.title: Snow Will Take Him
leave.text: You leave the dead to the cold. The wind begins covering him again before you are even gone.
